Dracon.name: Dracon
Dracon.equipped_with: A Dracon is equipped with: Plasma grenade.

option_groups.header: One Dracon per army can be upgraded to an Archon for +15 points.

abilities: Power through Pain
Deception: After all units have been placed in the Deployment phase, the Dracon may remove and redeploy one of his units.
Archon: Another unit may be redeployed.

Haemonculus.name: Haemonculus
Haemonculus.equipped_with: A Haemonculus is equipped with: Plasma grenade.

option_groups.header: One Haemonculus per army can be upgraded to a Master Haemonculus for +15 points.

abilities: Power through Pain
Master Haemonculus: A Master Haemonculus starts with an additional "Power through Pain" token.
Transformed shape: The unit starts with a "Power through Pain" token.

Succubus.name: Succubus
Succubus.equipped_with: A Succubus is a single character model and equipped with: Plasma grenade.

option_groups.header: One Succubus per army can be upgraded to a Master Succubus for +15 points.

abilities: Combat drugs, Deflect, Power through Pain, Parry
Master Succubus: The model may select a second Combat drug.

Kabalite Warriors.name: Kabalite Warriors
Kabalite Warriors.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Splinter rifle.

option_groups.header: For each 5 models, one Kabalite may swap their Splinter rifle
For each 10 models, one Kabalite may swap their Splinter rifle
One model may be upgraded to a Sybarite for +5pts and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Power through Pain

Wracks.name: Wracks
Wracks.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Wrack blades.

option_groups.header: For each 5 models, one Wrack may be equipped with
One model may be upgraded to a Acothyst for +5pts and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Power through Pain
Transformed shape: The unit starts with a "Power through Pain" token.

Wyches.name: Wyches
Wyches.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Hekatarii blade; Splinter pistol; Plasma grenade.

weapons.name: Shardnet and impaler
weapons.abilities: Enemy models in base contact reduce their Attacks by 1 (minimum 1)

weapons.name: Razorflails
weapons.abilities: Re-roll to hit and to wound rolls, Flurry(1)

option_groups.header: For each 5 models, up to two Wyches my replace their Hekatarii blade
One model may be upgraded to a Hekatrix for +5pts and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Combat drugs, Deflect, Power through Pain, Parry

Grotesques.name: Grotesques
Grotesques.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Flesh gauntlet; Monstrous cleaver.

option_groups.header: Every model may swap their Monstrous cleaver each

abilities: Massive(1), Power through Pain
Transformed shape: The unit starts with a "Power through Pain" token.

Incubi.name: Incubi
Incubi.equipped_with: Every Incubi ist equipped with: Klaive.

option_groups.header: One model may be upgraded to a Klaivex for +22 points.

abilities: Power through Pain
Aspect armor: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.
Swords for hire: Add the <Kabal>, <Coven> or <Cult> KEYWORDS to the unit.

Mandrakes.name: Mandrakes
Mandrakes.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Baleblast; Glimmersteel blade.
abilities: Infilltrator, Move through cover, Power through Pain
Hunter: The unit rerolls hit and wound rolls against HQ and character models.
Fade away: During each Reinforcement phase, the unit may be set up again following the rules for Infiltrator.
Shadow Creature: The unit has a 5+ invulnerability saving throw. Hit rolls against the unit suffer a –1 penalty.
Swords for hire: Add the <Kabal>, <Coven> or <Cult> KEYWORDS to the unit.

Hellions.name: Hellions
Hellions.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Hellglaive; Splinter pod.

option_groups.header: One model may be upgraded to a Helliarch for +10pts and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Combat drugs, Hit & Run, Power through Pain

Reavers.name: Reavers
Reavers.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Bladevanes; Splinter pistol; Splinter rifle.

option_groups.header: Each model may swap their Splinter rifle
One model may be upgraded to an Arena Champion for +10pts and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Combat drugs, Hit & Run, Power through Pain

Scourges.name: Scourges
Scourges.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Shardcarbine; Plasma grenade.

option_groups.header: For each 5 models, two Scourges may swap their Shardcarbines
One model may be upgraded to a Solarite for +10pts and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Power through Pain
Ghostplate armor: The unit got a 5+ invulnerability save.
Swords for hire: Add the <Kabal>, <Coven> or <Cult> KEYWORDS to the unit.

Cronos.name: Cronos
Cronos.equipped_with: A Cronos is equipped with: Spirit syphon.

option_groups.header: May be equipped with

abilities: Anti-Grav, Power through Pain, Squadron
Soul harvest: After each activation in which the Cronos eliminates an enemy model, a friendly Dark Eldar unit within 18" gains a Power Through Pain token.

Ravager.name: Ravager
Ravager.equipped_with: A Ravager is equipped with: 3 Disintegrator cannons.

option_groups.header: Can replace each Disintegrator cannon
Can be equipped with a Flickerfield for +42 points.

abilities: Anti-Grav, Fast, Squadron
Aerial assault: The unit may fire all ranged weapons if it moved up to 12".

Talos.name: Talos
Talos.equipped_with: A Talos is equipped with: 2 Macro-scalpels; Twin splinter rifle.

option_groups.header: Can replace one Macro-scalpel
Can replace one Macro-scalpel
Can replace its Twin splinter rifle

abilities: Anti-Grav, Power through Pain, Squadron
Talos ichor injector: For each successful hit roll with this weapon, the target must pass a Toughness test. If the test fails, the model suffers a Mortal Wound.

Raider.name: Raider
Raider.equipped_with: A Raider is equipped with: Disintegrator cannon.

option_groups.header: Can replace its Disintegrator cannon
Can be equipped with a Flickerfield for +40 points.

abilities: Anti-Grav, Fast, Open
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 11 infantry models.

Venom.name: Venom
Venom.equipped_with: A Venom is a single model and equipped with: Bladevanes; Splinter cannon; Twin splinter rifle.

option_groups.header: Can replace its Twin splinter rifle
Can be equipped with a Flickerfield for +40 points.

abilities: Anti-Grav, Fast, Open
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 6 infantry models.
Vector Strike: Any unit this model overflows takes an automatic hit with its melee weapon profile.

Razorwing Jetfighter.name: Razorwing Jetfighter
Razorwing Jetfighter.equipped_with: A Razorwing Jetfighter is equipped with: 2 Disintegrator cannons; 2 Razorwing missiles; Twin splinter rifle.

option_groups.header: Can replace its two Disintegrator cannons
Can replace its Twin splinter rifle
Can be equipped with a Flickerfield for +41 points.

Voidraven Bomber.name: Voidraven Bomber
Voidraven Bomber.equipped_with: A Voidraven Bomber is equipped with: 2 Dark scythes; Void mine.

option_groups.header: Can replace its two Dark scythes
Can be equipped with Voidraven missiles for +51 points.
Can be equipped with a Flickerfield for +41 points.

weapons.name: Dark gate
weapons.abilities: Ammo(1), AT(4), Barrage, Units hit must pass a Strength test or suffer three Mortal Wounds.

weapons.name: Electrocorrosive whip
weapons.abilities: Poison(3+), All models that were hit half their Strength until the bearers next activation.

weapons.name: Ichor injectorᶜᵒ
weapons.abilities: Extra attack, For each successful hit roll with this weapon, the target must pass a Toughness test. If the test fails, the model dies immediately. Doesn't work against vehicles.

weapons.name: Orb of despair
weapons.abilities: Ammo(1), Explosive, To wound rolls are rolled against the target's Leadership value

weapons.name: Razorflailsᶜᵘ
weapons.abilities: Re-roll to hit and to wound rolls

weapons.name: Shardnet and impalerᶜᵘ
weapons.abilities: Enemy models in base contact reduce their Attacks by 1 (minimum 1)

equipment.name: A league apartᶜᵘ
equipment.desc: If the Initiative value of the Succubus is higher than that of any enemy in direct base contact, she gets +2 Attacks. Unique.

equipment.name: Animus Vitaeᶜᵒ
equipment.desc: If the wearer eliminated an enemy model during their activation, they gain an additional "Power through Pain" token. Unique.

equipment.name: Archangel of Pain
equipment.desc: One enemy unit within 12" must pass a Leadership test or have WS 6+ and Initiative 1 until the end of their next activation. Ammo(1). Unique.

equipment.name: Artefact of Commoragh
equipment.desc:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range (only for ranged weapons)
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Every enhancement is unique per army. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Blood dancerᶜᵘ
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain +2" charge range.

equipment.name: Clone field
equipment.desc: The bearer ignores the first two hits each game.

equipment.name: Crucible of Malediction
equipment.desc: All psykers within 12" must pass a Leadership test or be killed immediately. Ammo(1). Unique.

equipment.name: Crystal heart
equipment.desc: The bearer and an attached unit are immune to psychic powers. Unique.

equipment.name: Decapitator
equipment.desc: All melee attacks of the model gain the "Deadly(5+)" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Executioner’s armour
equipment.desc: The model gains a 2+ save.

equipment.name: Farseer bones
equipment.desc: Once per game, after both players have rolled for Initiative, the bearer's roll can be increased by +2. Unique.

equipment.name: Ghostplate armor
equipment.desc: The bearer gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Marksman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Ballistic skill.

equipment.name: Master of Painᶜᵒ
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Narthecium" ability.

equipment.name: Master-crafted weapon
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll one to hit roll per activation. Must be purchased for each weapon seperately.

equipment.name: Realspace raiderᴷ
equipment.desc: All rolls for reserves are automatically successfull.

equipment.name: Shadow fieldᴷ
equipment.desc: The bearer got a 2+ invulnerability save. If the saving throw fails once, the Shadow field can't be used for the rest of the game. Unique.

equipment.name: Skybike
equipment.desc: The bearer gains +6" Movement, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound and the "Jetbike" ability.

equipment.name: Skyboard
equipment.desc: The bearer gains +6" Movement and the "Jump pack" ability.

equipment.name: Soul trap
equipment.desc: Everytime the bearer destroys an enemy character model or monstrous creature, they add the Strength value to their own for the rest of the game.

equipment.name: Stimulant supply
equipment.desc: The bearer may select an additional Combat drug.

equipment.name: Swordsman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Weapon skill.

equipment.name: Teleport homing beacon
equipment.desc: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Trophy
equipment.desc: Enemy units within a 6" radius suffer -1 to their Leadership.

equipment.name: Twilight shroud
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Stealth" abilities.

equipment.name: Vexator mask
equipment.desc: The model gains (cumulative) "Parry".

equipment.name: Adrenalight
equipment.desc: The unit gains +1 Attack.

equipment.name: Grave lotus
equipment.desc: The unit gains +1 Strength.

equipment.name: Hypex
equipment.desc: The unit automatically advances 6" instead of rolling for the distance.

equipment.name: Serpentin
equipment.desc: The unit gains +1 to hit rolls in melee.

equipment.name: Painbringer
equipment.desc: The unit gains +1 Toughness.

equipment.name: Splintermind
equipment.desc: The unit starts with a(n) (additional) "Power through Pain" token.

equipment.name: Additional armor
equipment.desc: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

equipment.name: Bladevanes
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Vector strike" ability and the following weapon: S:+1 AP:-2 D:1, Unwieldy.

equipment.name: Flickerfield
equipment.desc: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Improved targeting
equipment.desc: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons at all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

equipment.name: Night shield
equipment.desc: Enemy models reduce their weapons range by 12" (to a minimum of 6"), if they target the bearer.

equipment.name: Smoke Launcher
equipment.desc:
The model can use its Smoke Launcher once per game:
- During normal activation, instead of firing weapons.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit. The order is consumed by doing so.
Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.

equipment.name: Trophy
equipment.desc: Enemy units within a 6" radius suffer -1 to their Leadership.

equipment.name: Connoisseur of Pain
equipment.desc: Each "Power through Pain" token that is assigned to the model or its attached unit may select a second ability assigned to it.

equipment.name: Scarlet Epicurean
equipment.desc: All to wound rolls against the model suffer a -1 penalty. Unique.

equipment.name: Spirit-Sting
equipment.desc: One weapon of the model gains the "Soul burn(5+)" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Armor of Misery
equipment.desc: The model gains a 2+ armor save and the "Parry" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Famed Savagery
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Attack. Unique.

equipment.name: Labyrinthine Cunning
equipment.desc: You gain an additional 0,25 Victory Points (VP) from secondary objectives. Unique.

equipment.name: Soul-Seeker
equipment.desc: One weapon of the model gains the "Soul burn(5+)" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Blood Dancer
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Deflagrate(5+)" ability with all melee weapons. Unique.

equipment.name: Hyperswift reflexes
equipment.desc: The model gains a cumulative instance of both the "Deflect" and "Parry" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Treacherous Deceiver
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Retribution(5)" ability. Unique.

archetypes.name: Bloodbrides
archetypes.desc:
- The army may only consist of <Cult> units.
- Each unit gains +1 Leadership and doubles the amount of weapons the individual models may swap. Example: If the unit entry says that "for every 5 models, one may swap its weapon", the unit would be allowed to swap two weapons per 5 models.

archetypes.name: Coordinated Raid
archetypes.desc:
- The army gets a third HQ slot and must feature one Dracon, one Haemoncolus and one Succubus (or their upgraded variants).
- The army gets a third trait and must pick one trait each for <Coven>, <Kabal>, and <Wyches>.

archetypes.name: Haemoxytes
archetypes.desc:
- The army may only consist of <Coven> units.
- Each unit gains +1 Leadership and doubles the amount of weapons the individual models may swap. Example: If the unit entry says that "for every 5 models, one may swap its weapon", the unit would be allowed to swap two weapons per 5 models.

archetypes.name: Trueborn
archetypes.desc:
- The army may only consist of <Kabal> units.
- Each unit gains +1 Leadership and doubles the amount of weapons the individual models may swap. Example: If the unit entry says that "for every 5 models, one may swap its weapon", the unit would be allowed to swap two weapons per 5 models.

archetypes.name: Ynnari
archetypes.desc:
- Ynnari become "Battle Brothers" for Eldar.
- The army got access to the Ynnari Armory and the Revenant discipline (see Eldar). 
- May not select any Legacy.

legacies.name: Butchers of Flesh
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Coven Armory.

legacies.name: Spectacle of Murder
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Wych Armory.

legacies.name: Thirst for Power
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Kabal Armory.

traits.name: Acrobatic Displayᶜᵘ
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Move through cover" ability and may ignore enemy models in its path when consolidating in melee.

traits.name: Artists of the Fleshᶜᵒ
traits.desc: The unit gains +1 Strength and the "Berserk(5+)" ability. Only for creatures.

traits.name: Berserk Fugueᶜᵘ
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Berserk(5+)" and "Furious Charge" abilities. Only for creatures.

traits.name: Dark Harvestᶜᵒ
traits.desc: After finishing a charge move, the enemy unit suffers one automatic wound with S:4 AP:0 D:1 for every friendly model that made it into base contact. Only for creatures.

traits.name: Dark Mirthᴷ
traits.desc: For every model in this unit, an enemy unit activating within 12" of it suffers 1 automatic wound with S:4 AP:0 D:1, Seeking. Can't cause more wounds than models in the enemy unit. Only for creatues.

traits.name: Dark Technomancersᶜᵒ
traits.desc: Any or all ranged weapons of the unit may be overcharged when shooting. Add +1 to wound rolls and -1 AP to each weapon. All overcharged weapons gain the "Overheating" ability.

traits.name: Deadly Deceiversᴷ
traits.desc: The unit does not lose its Order token when it receives two or more Battleshock tokens. It may still be activated normally after the compulsary move. Only for creatures.

traits.name: Disdain for Lesser Beingsᴷ
traits.desc: Every melee combat result is increased by +2 for the unit.

traits.name: Enhanced Sensory Organsᶜᵒ
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Sunder(1)" ability for all ranged attacks.

traits.name: Hungry for Fleshᶜᵒ
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Frenzy(1")" ability.

traits.name: Masters of Mutagensᶜᵒ
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Precision(5+)" ability with Poison weapons. Does not apply to "Heavy" weapons.

traits.name: Merciless Razorkinᴷ
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Deflagrate(5+)" ability with Splinter weapons. Does not apply to "Heavy" weapons.

traits.name: Obsessive Collectorsᶜᵒ
traits.desc: Everytime an enemy unit is destroyed in melee within 6" of this unit, it regains D3 lost wounds. If no wounds can be healed, dead models are instead revived. Only for creatues.

traits.name: Precise Killersᶜᵘ
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Rending(5+)" ability with all melee weapons. Only for creatures.

traits.name: Slashing Impactᶜᵘ
traits.desc: After finishing a charge move, the enemy unit suffers one automatic wound with S:4 AP:0 D:1 for every friendly model that made it into base contact. Only for creatures.

traits.name: Splinter Bladesᶜᵒ
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Deflagrate(5+)" ability with all melee weapons. Only for creatures.

traits.name: Test of Skillᶜᵘ
traits.desc: The unit may re-roll to hit and to wound rolls of 1 against HQ, character models and Monstrous Creatures.

traits.name: The Art of Painᶜᵘ
traits.desc: Every time the unit is activated while in melee combat, it gains an additional effect from the "Power through Pain" table. The effects are lost once the melee ends.

traits.name: Torturous Efficiencyᴷ
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Rending(5+)" ability with all weapons.

traits.name: Toxin Craftersᴷ
traits.desc: The unit may re-roll to wound rolls of 1 with Poison weapons.

traits.name: Trophy Takersᶜᵘ
traits.desc: Enemy units within 12" must roll an additional die for each Leadership test and take the highest two.

traits.name: Twisted Huntersᴷ
traits.desc: The unit may re-roll to hit and to wound rolls of 1 against HQ, character models and Monstrous Creatures.
